title: Deku's More Ice
description: A simple vanilla+ Minecraft mod that provides a means of reliably creating ice as well as new ice blocks obtainable through the stonecutter.
body:
This is a vanilla+ mod that simply adds more variants of the standard ice blocks to Minecraft. It also provides a way for a player to reliably create ice blocks without the need for a silk touch pickaxe through the new freezer block! The freezer is similar to a furnace, but takes in various cold items from Minecraft as the base, and freezes snow (or buckets of water) into ice!

New blocks apply for all 3 types of ice in vanilla Minecraft (ice, packed ice and blue ice):
- Ice Slab
- Ice Pressure Plate
- Ice Button
- Ice Wall
- Ice Stairs
- Ice Bricks
- Ice Brick Stairs
- Ice Brick Wall
- Ice Brick Slab

To obtain these blocks, just take the relevant form of ice to a stonecutter! Some can be crafted through the expected vanilla recipes for their given shape as well.
